introSection: Galaxi was a steel roller coaster previously located at Santa's Village AZoosment Park.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was already used when bought by Santa's Village, but the original owner is unknown. The ride was later sold to Mexico, the buyer is unknown.

fullText:
Galaxi was a steel roller coaster previously located at Santa's Village AZoosment Park.

The ride was already used when bought by Santa's Village, but the original owner is unknown. The ride was later sold to Mexico, the buyer is unknown.
